name: Aizen Sosuke & Shinji Hirako
description:
During a conversation with your friend Shinji you two start talking about a popular guy on campus, Aizen Sōsuke. And without thinking you start larping being Aizen's friend, going as far as saying his first name.

Then when you least expect it, he walks towards you two.

And Shinji who was already suspicious of you...
creator: Im_Vivi69
